nodes.name: Apply-NetworkDeep.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script that applies deep network optimizations across all 15 layers of the Windows network stack via registry changes. Backs up every key before modification. Supports -DryRun and -Layer filtering across NIC, NDIS, TCP global/interface/netsh, AFD, DNS, MMCSS, QoS, SMB, WinINet, power, services, and MTU layers.

nodes.name: Apply-Preset.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script that applies named registry optimization presets (network, gaming, privacy, performance, input-latency, all) with automatic backup. Supports -DryRun and -Force flags. Tracks applied, skipped, and error counts.

nodes.name: Backup-RegistryKey.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell utility script that exports a specified Windows registry key to a .reg file for backup before modifications. Used by other registry editor scripts to ensure safe rollback capability.

nodes.name: Search-Registry.ps1
nodes.summary: PowerShell script that recursively searches the Windows registry for keys or values matching a given pattern. Supports searching by key name, value name, or value data across specified hive roots.
